summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM B2B application. Backend APIs working at 88.9% success rate, frontend fully functional with excellent UX. One performance issue identified with sales endpoint.

flaky_endpoints.impact: Sales data cannot be loaded in reasonable time

passed_tests: Stats endpoint returning correct data structure
Login page renders with proper form elements
Authentication flow working with test credentials
Catalog page displaying products with search functionality
Product approval checkboxes working with toast notifications
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate performance issue with /api/ventas endpoint - likely caused by complex database view queries. Consider optimization or pagination improvements for v_ventas_pos_filtradas view.
